fato_historico: 1995: On the Caribbean island of Montserrat, the Soufrière Hills volcano erupts. Over the course of several years, it devastates the island, destroying the capital, forcing most of the population to flee.
energia_do_dia: Much like the earth that reshapes itself after the powerful awakenings of hidden mountains, you may find that today invites a graceful transformation within your spirit. Consider this an opportune moment to release what no longer serves your growth. Trust that your path is unfolding beautifully, even as you navigate the natural shifts in your personal landscape.
frase_do_dia: Beauty blooms brightest when we courageously embrace the changes life brings our way.
significado_numero: The master builder number representing manifestation and grounding your highest dreams.
conselho: Nurture your roots and allow your authentic self to blossom with confidence.
